use_cases: Display keyboard shortcuts in an interactive, visually appealing way
Show keyboard shortcut sequences with glowing key highlights
Create keyboard shortcut documentation with hover animations
Build keyboard navigation guides for applications
ai_summary: A fully interactive glowing keyboard component with customizable glow colors, hover effects, and support for highlighting specific key combinations. Uses motion/react for smooth animations and includes specialized key types like fingerprint keys and arrow keys. Designed primarily for desktop display with a glass-morphism aesthetic featuring gradient accents and glow effects.
